body_preview: - 275 fixture JSON files under `eval/fixtures/local-smoke/` contain commands using `cargo run --bin yoyo` (confirmed by `grep -rl 'cargo.*--bin yoyo' eval/fixtures/local-smoke/*.json | wc -l` → 275). - The binary was renamed to `yyds` (confirmed: `yyds --version` → `yyds v0.1.14`; `cargo test --bin yyds` passes). - The `run_fixture_command` function in `src/
expected_evidence: Zero "no bin target named 'yoyo'" errors in eval fixture output. The fixture score report shows actual harness health (pass/fail by fixture) rather than binary-rename noise. title: Fix stale `--bin yoyo` references in eval fixture runner
